purpose: Test suite for the AI Understanding subsystem. Covers sha1, glob matching, validators, CRUD, skeleton generation, status (staleness) computation, AIU injection block formatter, idempotent injectMarkedBlock, hook installer, and end-to-end pre-commit hook integration against real tmp git repos.
calls_out_to: execFileSync('git', [...]) — init, add, commit, config in tmp repos
spawnSync('node', [HOOK_SOURCE], {cwd: tmp}) — run the hook driver against fixtures
fs.* for fixture setup and teardown
invariants: Each test creates an isolated tmp dir; rm() cleanup runs at end of every test path that succeeds.
tmpGitRepo() configures user.email / user.name / commit.gpgsign=false so tests do not depend on the host's global git config.
Hook integration tests invoke the actual cli/aiu-precommit.js via spawnSync — they verify real git interaction, not mocks.
gotchas: Tests that mutate Module._load to stub vscode (e.g. testBuildTooltip, testInjectMarkedBlockIdempotent) MUST restore the original after their require — otherwise the stub leaks.
fixtureProject() creates node_modules/foo/ to verify it is excluded from tracked globs — removing this fixture would silently weaken the exclude-globs assertion.
Hook integration tests require `git` on PATH — there is no fallback if git is missing.
